lore.subspaceparasite.buglin: §lEpithet:§r Lodo §l|§r §oRoughly the size of a basketball, this grub-like mass is formed from unstable flesh that bends and compresses in ways it should not.
lore.subspaceparasite.crux: §lEpithet:§r Cruxa §l|§r §oFramework of a brutish, selfless creature still knitting itself together.
lore.subspaceparasite.draconite: §lEpithet:§r Heblu §l|§r §oIt is perpetually caked in ash, burning from the inside out.
lore.subspaceparasite.heed: §lEpithet:§r Heed §l|§r §oFive-headed scout borne on an ant-like frame.
lore.subspaceparasite.host: §lEpithet:§r Host §l|§r §oIt is often said that earthquakes foretell doom.
lore.subspaceparasite.kirin: §lEpithet:§r Kirin §l|§r §oKirin exists in a constant state of structural failure.
lore.subspaceparasite.mangler: §lEpithet:§r Nuuh §l|§r §oA close-quarters brute derived from Rupters, grown specifically for larger prey.
lore.subspaceparasite.rupter: §lEpithet:§r Mudo §l|§r §oRupters operate in packs, using speed and numbers to split formations and harass isolated targets.
message.subspaceparasite.purifier_not_ov: This needs to sit on an SP block.
msg.subspaceparasite.barrier.no_permissi: You don't have permission to configure this barrier.
tooltip.dislodgement: Scans for Dislodgement Events/Info/Code and decodes them. §l|§r §oInsert into the Relay Terminal and press Scan.
tooltip.module_dislodgement: Used by the Relay Controller to print the current dislodgement code.
tooltip.relay_base: §7Bottom piece of §6Relay Multiblock. §7Forms the relay when stacked with middle and top.
tooltip.relay_middle: §7Middle piece of §6Relay Multiblock. §7Connects base to the antenna.
tooltip.relay_roof: §7Top piece of §6Relay Multiblock. §7Antenna head of the relay used for capturing Dispatcher frequencies.
tooltip.relaycontroller: §7Controls the §6Relay Multiblock. §7Breaking it dismantles the whole structure.
tooltip.subspaceparasite.bough.line1: Shines with a radiant, warming yellow hue.
tooltip.subspaceparasite.false_apple: §7§o"Is it so wrong that I survived?"

tooltip.subspaceparasite.pearl.desc: Gleams with a euphoric shimmer only present around its beholder. Item will disappear if wielder is slain by its beholder.
tooltip.subspaceparasite.shrimp.ariral: Can be fed to an assimilated enderman.
tooltip.subspaceparasite.shrimp.arrow: Sometimes falls from parasites during an Arrow's presence.
tooltip.subspaceparasite.shrimp.desc: The greatest delicacy in the multiverse.
Parasites ignore the Player while in inventory. Derived Distortion Phenomenon is negated.
One who seeks to be born must first destroy a world.
tooltip.subspaceparasite.thornshade_deca: Redirects a portion of melee damage back to the attacker.
Does not affect ranged or magic damage.
